hero.subtitle: Experience five-star dental care with the most advanced technology and a team of leading specialists.
hero.imageAlt: Exterior of Nha Khoa Tinh Anh Clinic

experts.title: Ethics Combined
experts.desc: At Nha Khoa Tinh Anh, we believe a beautiful smile begins with understanding. Every doctor is not only a technical expert but also a dedicated companion on your dental care journey.
experts.quote: We don't just fix teeth — we change lives through confident smiles.

services.title: Technology & Precision

items.title: Dental Implants
items.desc: The most durable solution for missing teeth, using high-precision positioning technology from Switzerland.

items.title: Aesthetic Braces
items.desc: Achieve perfectly aligned teeth with clear Invisalign technology — effective and absolutely aesthetic.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.desc: Veneer lamination and advanced teeth whitening for a radiant smile while preserving your natural tooth structure.

items.title: General Treatment
items.desc: Routine oral care, root canal treatment, and painless extractions with FDA-standard sterile equipment.

services.precisionDesc: Using 3D Cone Beam CT imaging diagnostics and the latest generation Itero scanners, we guarantee accurate treatment results and absolute safety for patients.

experience.title: Luxurious Space,
experience.desc: Leave behind all worries about a "clinic" — Nha Khoa Tinh Anh offers a relaxing space like a premium hotel lounge, so you feel completely at ease throughout your visit.

steps.title: One-on-One Consultation
steps.desc: Doctors listen directly and design a personalized treatment plan based on your condition and goals.

steps.title: International-Standard Process
steps.desc: Every procedure is carried out under strict medical and aesthetic control.

pricing.title: Transparent Price List

items.name: Emax Veneer (Ultra-thin)
items.desc: Maximum preservation of natural teeth, 20-year durability

pricing.note: * Prices are for reference only. The exact cost depends on your specific dental condition after examination.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say About Nha Khoa Tinh Anh
testimonials.centerImageAlt: Confident smile after treatment at Nha Khoa Tinh Anh

items.name: Ms. Lan Phuong
items.quote: The space feels like a 5-star hotel, and the doctors were incredibly attentive. My new veneers look so natural my friends couldn't tell.

items.name: Mr. Duc Thinh
items.quote: Getting an implant here was nearly painless, with thorough aftercare follow-up. After 3 months I can chew as comfortably as with natural teeth.

items.name: Ms. Ngoc Ha
items.quote: Clear braces let me stay confident at work every day without anyone noticing. The results matched exactly what the doctor promised.

items.name: Mr. Minh Quan
items.quote: Just 45 minutes and my teeth were noticeably whiter, with zero sensitivity. Professional service from reception to the doctor.

footer.desc: An international-standard dental system in Vietnam, bringing together leading specialists and the most advanced technology for Vietnamese smiles.
footer.address: 123 Nguyen Hue Street, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City
footer.hoursNote: Closed on public holidays and Tet
